title: Note de transmission de l'instrument finlandais
text_preview: I. the undersigned, Thorvald STOLTENBERG, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Norway, hereby authorize and empower Mr. Arne LANGELAND, Ambassador of Norway in Paris, to sign the Final Act Of the Conference of Plenipotentiaries for the establishment of a European Synchrotron Radiation Facility. Oslo, on this twelfth day of December, One Thousand Nine Hundred and Eighty-eight

pages.text:
I.

the undersigned,

Thorvald

STOLTENBERG,

Minister of Foreign Affairs of Norway, hereby authorize and empower Mr. Arne LANGELAND, Ambassador of Norway in

Paris, to sign the

Final Act Of the Conference of

Plenipotentiaries for the establishment of a European

Synchrotron Radiation Facility.

Oslo, on this twelfth day of December,

One Thousand Nine Hundred and Eighty-eight
